title: Tal An Fissures
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Tal An Fissures''' was an area of geological upheaval that was located near the ruins of [[Derem City]], beneath the oceans of the planet [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''
